subject: LU-8454 Remove struct mgs_send_param and its users

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 4:

Oleg, it looks like the removal of this code is breaking interop tests from
2.12 clients running against master:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1651e5e5-b31f-401d-85c3-4c8eea551d2a

 LustreError: 11-0: MGC10.9.6.123@tcp: operation mgs_set_info to node 10.9.6.123@tcp failed: rc = -524
 LustreError: 29971:0:(dir.c:421:ll_send_mgc_param()) Failed to set parameter: -524
 Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl mark  sanity test_65i: @@@@@@ FAIL: error setting stripe 

It seems that we need to revert removal of mgs_set_info() and change the "good until" version, and have it accept the MGS_SET_INFO RPC for the lov.stripe_* parameters but
return 0 without doing anything.

commit.subject: LU-8454 Remove struct mgs_send_param and its users
commit.message:
LU-8454 Remove struct mgs_send_param and its users

This code has been somewhat dormant since 2.9 and now it's
time to remove it.
